summary: Iteration 37 — full end-to-end validation of 4 new KDMARCHÉ features: plan visibility toggle/scheduling, credits grant-by-profile, connectors broadcast-spots, vendor monthly report email. ALL PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: PlanFormModal uses <input type='date'> for visible_from/visible_until (YYYY-MM-DD, not datetime-local). Backend accepts and computes window correctly. Consistent, no bug.
PricingPage / PlansTab correctly filter using /api/public/plans (server-side visibility windowing). Baseline 3 plans, filtered plans reflect visibility changes instantly.
Sync queue in /admin/connecteurs displays broadcast_spots events with concise error messages including HTTP status + endpoint. Good observability.
seed_data_creation: None. State restored: ess-impact-pro visible=true (toggled off→on), ess-acces-pro visible_from cleared after scheduling test. Public /tarifs verified to show 3 cards at end. Only side-effect: +5 credits granted once to 1 COOPER account (per instructions, small amount) and 1 vendor monthly report email sent via Brevo (as requested with force=true).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login response uses `access_token` field (not `token`). Login form is in ENGLISH ('Sign in' button). Admin plans page = /admin/plans (routes /admin/connecteurs for connectors). Testids: toggle-visible-plan-{slug}, plan-visibility-badge-{slug}, edit-plan-{slug}, plan-visible-switch, plan-visible-from-input (type=date, YYYY-MM-DD), plan-visible-until-input, plan-modal-save, tab-credits, profile-grant-{select,amount,btn}, connectors-broadcast-spots-btn. Sync queue events show broadcast_spots status=ERROR with 404 details for the 4 external apps (crm-ess, coppam, oscop-ge, oscop-ia-bois) — this is EXPECTED (receiver endpoint /api/kdmarche/spots not yet implemented on those apps).
verified_features: UI: click toggle-visible-plan-ess-impact-pro → badge 'Masqué' appears, public /tarifs (unauth) drops to 2 cards (ess-acces-pro + ess-volume-pro). Re-click restores 3 cards.

UI: edit-plan-ess-acces-pro modal exposes plan-visible-switch + plan-visible-from-input + plan-visible-until-input. Setting visible_from=2099-01-01 + save → badge 'Programmé dès le 2099-01-01', /tarifs shows only 2 cards. Clearing and saving → /tarifs shows 3 cards again.
UI: tab-credits > profile-grant-select=COOPER, amount=5, click profile-grant-btn → toast '5 crédits attribués à 1 compte(s) du profil COOPER'.

UI: /admin/connecteurs > connectors-broadcast-spots-btn click → 4 new broadcast_spots ERROR events in sync queue (crm-ess/coppam/oscop-ge/oscop-ia-bois all POST /api/kdmarche/spots -> 404). Toast body contains '2 spot(s) vidéo'.
curl: POST /api/admin/plans/credits/grant-by-profile {profile:'xyz', amount:5} + Bearer admin → HTTP 404 {detail:'Aucun utilisateur avec le profil xyz'}.
curl: POST /api/admin/vendor-reports/send?force=true + Bearer admin → HTTP 200 {status:'DONE', sent:1} (real Brevo email sent).
notes: Non-blocking: WebSocket connection error in browser console (no impact on functionality). Stripe LIVE — no payment attempted. No AI generation triggered. Final DB state: all 3 plans visible=true, no scheduling window set.
